_readme: Expected-output model for out/steps/step3d_sentiment.json (sentiment module — the only place the sentiment method exists). One record per TIER-1 thread: mean VADER compound of the first-person past-decision sentences (null when the thread has none), how many such sentences were found, and the un-collapsed 'sentences' list (each with its own sentence text, matched verb, build/buy stance tag, and tone). Consistency across all of these is checked in code (pipeline/checks.py check_module).
